retry_reason: The operation always executes and never fails; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This function is a cleanup wrapper that calls btrfs_release_path to decrement reference counts on all extent buffers in the path, then frees the btrfs_path structure. It is intended to be used with the __free attribute for automatic cleanup on scope exit. The caller must ensure the path is valid and has been initialized. After calling this function, the path pointer is invalid and must not be used.
